name: systemfehler
description: Modular, extensible, preservation-oriented data platform for social services in Germany

scripts.crawl:all: python crawlers/cli.py crawl benefits --source arbeitsagentur && python crawlers/cli.py crawl aid --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl tools --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl organizations --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl contacts --source seeded
scripts.expand:links:all: python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain benefits && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain aid && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain tools && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain organizations && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain contacts
scripts.dev:all: cross-env API_PORT=3001 AI_PORT=8002 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://systemfehler:dev_password@localhost:5432/systemfehler concurrently -k -n api,frontend,ai,docker -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run api" "npm run dev" "npm run ai:api" "docker-compose up"
scripts.ai:api:ollama: cross-env AI_PORT=8002 AI_PROVIDER=ollama AI_DEFAULT_MODEL=llama3.1:8b AI_MODEL_REWRITE=llama3.1:8b AI_MODEL_SYNTHESIZE=llama3.1:8b AI_MODEL_ENRICH=llama3.1:8b uvicorn backend.ai_service.gateway:app --reload --port %AI_PORT%
scripts.deploy:all: python crawlers/cli.py crawl benefits --source arbeitsagentur && python crawlers/cli.py validate --domain benefits && python crawlers/cli.py import --domain benefits --to-db && wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --remote --file=cloudflare-pages/d1/schema.sql && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml && wrangler pages deploy

_todo: TODO: Add dependencies as needed (e.g., ajv for JSON schema validation)
